title: chenopodium ambrosioides f. minus
intro: Chenopodium ambrosioides f. minus is a subspecies of the Mexican tea plant, belonging to the Chenopodium genus, characterized by its small stature and reduced leaf size. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to soothe respiratory issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Chenopodium ambrosioides f. minus include relief from coughs, colds, and flu, as well as reduced inflammation and improved digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or as an essential oil for topical application, showcasing its versatility in herbal medicine.
